channel.title: AI Coding on jqknono Blogs
channel.description: Recent content in AI Coding on jqknono Blogs

item.title: Claude Code's Resource Black Hole: From a 11.3MB Single File Package to a 1.2TB Disk Devourer
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: Based on real user reports from GitHub Issues and community reverse engineering, this article systematically reviews Claude Code’s resource management defects in memory, CPU, and disk, revealing structural problems in its packaging architecture, storage design, and process lifecycle management.
